allow: PowerShell($items = Get-ChildItem -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($items\) { $items | ForEach-Object { $_.Name } } else { "Directory is empty" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pid_value = $conn.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; $proc = Get-Process -Id $pid_value -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID: $pid_value"; "Name: $\($proc.ProcessName\)"; "Started: $\($proc.StartTime\)"; "CommandLine:"; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$pid_value"\).CommandLine } else { "Port 3000 is free" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pid_value = $conn.OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; "Port 3001 occupied by PID $pid_value — stopping..."; Stop-Process -Id $pid_value -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "Stopped." } else { "Port 3001 is free" })
